schema_info.description: Knowledge source for Recipe Preparation Agent RAG pipeline. Each object is one retrievable document/chunk. Embed the 'embedding_text' field using watsonx.ai embeddings (e.g., slate-125m-english-rtrvr) and store the full object as metadata for retrieval-augmented generation with IBM Granite.

fields.title: recipe name
fields.optional_ingredients: ingredients that enhance but aren't essential
fields.embedding_text: flattened text used to generate the vector embedding for retrieval

recipes.title: Vegetable Pulao
instructions: Soak rice for 20 minutes.
Heat oil, add whole spices until fragrant.
Add onion, saute until golden.
Add vegetables, saute 3-4 minutes.
Add rice, water (1:2), salt; bring to boil.
Cover, simmer 15-18 minutes.
Fluff and garnish before serving.
cooking_tips: Soaking rice prevents breakage.
Avoid over-stirring to prevent mushiness.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Pulao Indian vegetarian vegan gluten-free dairy-free rice mixed vegetables onion whole spices oil ghee cashews peas mint

recipes.title: Paneer Fried Rice
instructions: Shallow fry paneer cubes; set aside.
Saute garlic and onion whites on high flame.
Add chopped vegetables, stir-fry 2 minutes.
Add cold rice and soy sauce, toss on high heat.
Add fried paneer, garnish with spring onion.
cooking_tips: Use day-old rice for best texture.
Cook on high flame for smoky flavor.
recipes.embedding_text: Paneer Fried Rice Indo-Chinese vegetarian cooked rice paneer capsicum spring onion soy sauce garlic carrot sesame oil

recipes.title: Tomato Onion Rice
instructions: Cook rice and cool.
Heat oil, splutter mustard seeds and curry leaves.
Saute onion and garlic until translucent.
Add tomatoes, cook until soft.
Add spices and salt, mix in rice.
cooking_tips: Mash tomatoes for a richer base.
Great use for slightly stale rice.
recipes.embedding_text: Tomato Onion Rice South Indian vegetarian vegan gluten-free rice tomato onion garlic mustard seeds curry leaves peanuts green chili

recipes.title: Curd Rice
instructions: Mash warm rice slightly.
Mix in curd and a little milk.
Temper mustard seeds and curry leaves in oil.
Pour tempering over rice, mix, season with salt.
cooking_tips: Mix curd into warm (not hot) rice for best texture.
Ideal for leftover rice.
recipes.embedding_text: Curd Rice South Indian vegetarian gluten-free cooked rice yogurt mustard seeds curry leaves pomegranate cucumber green chili

recipes.title: Lemon Rice
instructions: Heat oil, splutter mustard seeds, curry leaves, and peanuts.
Add turmeric and green chili.
Add cooked rice, mix well.
Turn off heat, squeeze in lemon juice, toss and serve.
cooking_tips: Add lemon juice off the heat to preserve its fresh flavor.
recipes.embedding_text: Lemon Rice South Indian vegetarian vegan gluten-free cooked rice lemon mustard seeds curry leaves peanuts turmeric green chili ginger

recipes.title: Egg Fried Rice
instructions: Scramble eggs lightly, set aside.
Saute garlic, add vegetables, stir-fry.
Add rice and soy sauce, toss on high heat.
Fold in scrambled eggs, garnish and serve.
cooking_tips: Cook eggs separately for distinct fluffy pieces.
recipes.embedding_text: Egg Fried Rice Chinese non-vegetarian cooked rice eggs spring onion soy sauce garlic peas carrot sesame oil

recipes.title: Khichdi
instructions: Wash rice and dal together.
Heat ghee, temper cumin seeds.
Add vegetables and turmeric, saute briefly.
Add rice-dal mix and water, pressure cook 3-4 whistles.
Serve hot with a dollop of ghee.
cooking_tips: A comforting one-pot meal, great when unwell or for using leftover vegetables.
recipes.embedding_text: Khichdi Indian vegetarian gluten-free rice split moong dal turmeric cumin seeds ghee mixed vegetables ginger

recipes.title: Vegetable Fried Quinoa
instructions: Saute garlic and vegetables in oil.
Add cooked quinoa, soy sauce, toss well.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve.
cooking_tips: Quinoa is a high-protein substitute for rice in stir-fries.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Fried Quinoa International vegan vegetarian gluten-free cooked quinoa mixed vegetables garlic soy sauce tofu sesame seeds

recipes.title: Jeera Rice
instructions: Heat ghee, add cumin seeds and bay leaf until fragrant.
Add soaked rice and water, bring to boil.
Cover and simmer until cooked.
Fluff and garnish with coriander.
cooking_tips: Simple side dish that pairs with any curry.
recipes.embedding_text: Jeera Rice Indian vegetarian vegan gluten-free rice cumin seeds ghee bay leaf coriander leaves

recipes.title: Vegetable Biryani
instructions: Fry onions until golden brown; set aside.
Marinate vegetables in yogurt and spices.
Par-cook rice with whole spices.
Layer rice and vegetable mixture in a pot.
Top with fried onions and mint, cover tightly and cook on low heat (dum) for 20 minutes.
cooking_tips: The 'dum' slow-cooking step is key to authentic flavor.
Layering evenly ensures balanced taste in every bite.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Biryani Indian vegetarian gluten-free rice mixed vegetables yogurt biryani masala onion mint saffron cashews

recipes.title: Dal Tadka
instructions: Pressure-cook lentils with turmeric until soft.
Heat ghee, temper cumin, garlic, onion until golden.
Add tomatoes and spices, cook until oil separates.
Pour tempering over dal, simmer 5 minutes.
Garnish with coriander.
cooking_tips: Mash dal slightly for creamier texture.
A separate tempering (tadka) boosts aroma.
recipes.embedding_text: Dal Tadka Indian vegetarian gluten-free yellow lentils onion tomato garlic spices ghee cumin seeds coriander

recipes.title: Chana Masala
instructions: Saute onion, garlic, ginger until golden.
Add tomato and spices, cook until thick.
Add boiled/canned chickpeas and simmer 15 minutes.
Garnish with coriander and a squeeze of lemon.
cooking_tips: Mash a few chickpeas to thicken the gravy naturally.
recipes.embedding_text: Chana Masala Indian vegetarian vegan gluten-free chickpeas onion tomato garlic ginger spices coriander leaves lemon

recipes.title: Rajma Curry
instructions: Soak and boil kidney beans until soft (or use canned).
Saute onion, garlic until golden.
Add tomato puree and spices, cook until thick.
Add boiled beans, simmer 15 minutes.
Garnish and serve.
cooking_tips: Simmering longer deepens the flavor of the gravy.
recipes.embedding_text: Rajma Curry Indian vegetarian vegan gluten-free kidney beans onion tomato garlic spices cream coriander

recipes.title: Palak Paneer
instructions: Blanch spinach and blend into a puree.
Saute onion, garlic, ginger until golden.
Add spinach puree, spices, simmer 5 minutes.
Add paneer cubes and cream, cook 5 more minutes.
cooking_tips: Blanching spinach preserves its bright green color.
recipes.embedding_text: Palak Paneer Indian vegetarian gluten-free spinach paneer onion garlic cream ginger garam masala

recipes.title: Butter Chicken
instructions: Marinate and cook chicken until charred/cooked through.
Prepare tomato-cashew gravy base, simmer until thick.
Add butter and cream, blend smooth if desired.
Add cooked chicken, simmer 10 minutes.
Finish with kasuri methi and a swirl of cream.
cooking_tips: Charring the chicken first adds smoky depth to the dish.
recipes.embedding_text: Butter Chicken Indian non-vegetarian gluten-free chicken tomato butter cream spices cashews kasuri methi

recipes.title: Egg Curry
instructions: Saute onion, garlic until golden.
Add tomato and spices, cook until thick.
Add halved boiled eggs, simmer 10 minutes.
Garnish with coriander.
cooking_tips: Lightly frying boiled eggs before adding to curry improves texture.
recipes.embedding_text: Egg Curry Indian non-vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free boiled eggs onion tomato garlic spices coconut milk coriander

recipes.title: Thai Green Curry
instructions: Saute curry paste in a little oil until fragrant.
Add coconut milk, bring to simmer.
Add chicken/vegetables, cook until done.
Season with fish sauce, garnish with basil.
cooking_tips: Use full-fat coconut milk for a richer curry.
recipes.embedding_text: Thai Green Curry Thai non-vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free chicken or vegetables green curry paste coconut milk basil bell pepper fish sauce

recipes.title: Vegetable Korma
instructions: Blend cashews and onion into a smooth paste.
Saute the paste in oil until fragrant.
Add vegetables and spices, cook 5 minutes.
Add yogurt/coconut milk, simmer until vegetables are tender.
cooking_tips: Blending cashews gives korma its signature creamy texture without heavy cream.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Korma Indian vegetarian gluten-free mixed vegetables cashews yogurt onion spices cream raisins

recipes.title: Sambhar

common_substitutions.tamarind: lemon juice as a tangy substitute

instructions: Cook dal until soft.
Boil vegetables with tamarind water and sambhar powder.
Mix in cooked dal, simmer 10 minutes.
Temper mustard seeds and curry leaves, pour over sambhar.
cooking_tips: Balancing tamarind's tartness with a little jaggery improves flavor depth.
recipes.embedding_text: Sambhar South Indian vegetarian vegan gluten-free toor dal mixed vegetables tamarind sambhar powder curry leaves mustard seeds

recipes.title: Vegan Stir-Fried Noodles
instructions: Boil noodles, drain, toss with oil.
Saute garlic on high heat.
Add vegetables, stir-fry 3-4 minutes.
Add noodles and soy sauce, toss well.
Garnish with sesame and spring onion.
cooking_tips: Keep vegetables crunchy for authentic texture.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegan Stir-Fried Noodles Chinese vegan vegetarian dairy-free noodles mixed vegetables garlic soy sauce oil tofu sesame seeds

recipes.title: Chicken Stir Fry
instructions: Slice and season chicken.
Sear chicken until golden; set aside.
Saute garlic and vegetables until crisp-tender.
Return chicken, add soy sauce, toss and cook 2 minutes.
cooking_tips: Cook chicken in batches to avoid overcrowding the pan.
recipes.embedding_text: Chicken Stir Fry American/Fusion non-vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free chicken breast mixed vegetables garlic soy sauce ginger sesame oil

recipes.title: Schezwan Noodles

common_substitutions.schezwan sauce: chili garlic sauce + soy sauce mix

instructions: Boil noodles, drain and set aside.
Saute garlic and vegetables on high flame.
Add schezwan sauce and noodles, toss well.
Garnish with spring onion.
cooking_tips: Adjust chili level of sauce to taste before adding.
recipes.embedding_text: Schezwan Noodles Indo-Chinese vegetarian vegan noodles schezwan sauce garlic mixed vegetables spring onion vinegar

recipes.title: Beef and Broccoli Stir Fry
instructions: Marinate beef with soy sauce and cornstarch.
Sear beef quickly on high heat; set aside.
Stir-fry broccoli and garlic until bright green.
Return beef, add sauce, toss and cook 2 minutes.
cooking_tips: Slicing beef thinly against the grain keeps it tender.
recipes.embedding_text: Beef and Broccoli Stir Fry Chinese non-vegetarian dairy-free beef strips broccoli garlic soy sauce cornstarch ginger oyster sauce

recipes.title: Vegetable Chow Mein
instructions: Boil noodles, drain and toss with oil.
Stir-fry julienned vegetables on high heat.
Add noodles and soy sauce, toss thoroughly.
Garnish and serve hot.
cooking_tips: Julienne vegetables uniformly for even cooking.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Chow Mein Chinese vegetarian vegan noodles cabbage carrot capsicum soy sauce spring onion vinegar

recipes.title: Shrimp Fried Rice
instructions: Saute shrimp until pink; set aside.
Scramble eggs, set aside.
Saute garlic and vegetables, add rice and soy sauce.
Fold in shrimp and eggs, toss and serve.
cooking_tips: Do not overcook shrimp — it turns rubbery quickly.
recipes.embedding_text: Shrimp Fried Rice Chinese non-vegetarian dairy-free cooked rice shrimp eggs garlic soy sauce peas spring onion

recipes.title: Pad Thai
instructions: Soak rice noodles until pliable.
Stir-fry protein until cooked; push aside, scramble egg in same pan.
Add noodles and tamarind sauce, toss well.
Add bean sprouts, toss briefly, garnish with peanuts and lime.
cooking_tips: Keep the sauce-to-noodle ratio balanced to avoid sogginess.
recipes.embedding_text: Pad Thai Thai non-vegetarian dairy-free rice noodles egg tofu or shrimp tamarind paste bean sprouts peanuts lime

recipes.title: Chickpea Salad
instructions: Drain and rinse chickpeas.
Chop vegetables into small cubes.
Combine chickpeas and vegetables in a bowl.
Dress with olive oil, lemon, salt and pepper.
Chill 10 minutes before serving.
cooking_tips: Tastes better after resting 30 minutes for flavors to meld.
recipes.embedding_text: Chickpea Salad Mediterranean vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free chickpeas cucumber tomato onion lemon olive oil feta cheese parsley

recipes.title: Greek Salad
instructions: Chop cucumber, tomato, and onion into chunks.
Combine with olives and crumbled feta.
Dress with olive oil and oregano, toss gently.
cooking_tips: Use day-old bread cubes as a crunchy addition (panzanella style).
recipes.embedding_text: Greek Salad Mediterranean vegetarian gluten-free cucumber tomato red onion feta cheese olives olive oil oregano

recipes.title: Caprese Salad
instructions: Slice tomato and mozzarella into rounds.
Arrange alternating on a plate with basil leaves.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze, season with salt and pepper.
cooking_tips: Use ripe, in-season tomatoes for the best flavor.
recipes.embedding_text: Caprese Salad Italian vegetarian gluten-free tomato mozzarella basil olive oil balsamic glaze

recipes.title: Kachumber Salad
instructions: Finely chop cucumber, tomato, and onion.
Combine in a bowl with chopped coriander.
Season with lemon juice, salt, and chaat masala.
cooking_tips: A refreshing side that pairs with any Indian meal.
recipes.embedding_text: Kachumber Salad Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free cucumber tomato onion lemon coriander green chili chaat masala

recipes.title: Vegetable Clear Soup
instructions: Chop vegetables finely and uniformly.
Boil stock with garlic and vegetables.
Simmer 10 minutes until tender.
Season with salt, pepper, and soy sauce.
cooking_tips: Great way to use up vegetable scraps before they spoil.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Clear Soup International vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free mixed vegetables garlic vegetable stock pepper spring onion soy sauce

recipes.title: Tomato Soup
instructions: Saute onion and garlic until soft.
Add chopped tomatoes, cook until mushy.
Blend smooth, return to pot.
Add cream, simmer, season and serve with basil.
cooking_tips: Roasting tomatoes first deepens the flavor.
recipes.embedding_text: Tomato Soup International vegetarian gluten-free tomato onion garlic cream basil butter

recipes.title: Sweet Corn Soup
instructions: Boil stock with corn.
Mix cornstarch with water and stir in to thicken.
Drizzle beaten egg in slowly while stirring for egg-drop effect (optional).
Garnish with spring onion and serve hot.
cooking_tips: Stir continuously while adding cornstarch slurry to avoid lumps.
recipes.embedding_text: Sweet Corn Soup Chinese vegetarian gluten-free sweet corn cornstarch vegetable stock spring onion egg garlic

recipes.title: Chicken Noodle Soup
instructions: Saute onion, carrot, celery until soft.
Add stock and chicken, simmer until cooked.
Shred chicken, return to pot.
Add noodles, cook until tender, garnish with parsley.
cooking_tips: A classic comfort food, great for using leftover roast chicken.
recipes.embedding_text: Chicken Noodle Soup American non-vegetarian chicken noodles carrot celery onion stock parsley

recipes.title: Vegetable Sandwich
instructions: Spread butter/chutney on bread slices.
Layer sliced vegetables evenly.
Top with second slice, grill or toast if desired.
Cut and serve.
cooking_tips: Grilling adds crunch, but it's equally good cold for a quick lunch.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Sandwich International vegetarian vegan option bread cucumber tomato onion butter cheese chutney

recipes.title: Paneer Tikka Wrap
instructions: Marinate paneer cubes in yogurt and spices.
Grill or pan-fry until charred.
Warm tortilla/roti, spread chutney.
Add paneer, onion, and vegetables, roll tightly.
cooking_tips: A hot tawa/pan sear gives authentic charred tikka flavor.
recipes.embedding_text: Paneer Tikka Wrap Indian vegetarian gluten-free (use GF wrap) paneer yogurt spices tortilla/roti onion mint chutney capsicum

recipes.title: Bean Quesadilla
instructions: Mash beans, season with spices.
Spread on tortilla with cheese, fold.
Cook on a hot pan until golden and crisp both sides.
Cut into wedges, serve with salsa.
cooking_tips: Press gently with a spatula for even crisping.
recipes.embedding_text: Bean Quesadilla Mexican vegetarian gluten-free (corn tortilla) tortilla beans cheese onion capsicum salsa

recipes.title: Egg Sandwich
instructions: Mash boiled eggs with mayonnaise and seasoning.
Spread on bread slices.
Add lettuce and onion if using, close sandwich, cut and serve.
cooking_tips: Chilling the egg mixture briefly makes it easier to spread.
recipes.embedding_text: Egg Sandwich International non-vegetarian bread boiled eggs mayonnaise onion lettuce black pepper

recipes.title: Aloo Paratha
instructions: Boil and mash potatoes with spices.
Stuff dough balls with potato filling, roll gently.
Cook on a hot tawa with ghee/oil until golden on both sides.
cooking_tips: Keep filling well-sealed inside the dough to prevent tearing while rolling.
recipes.embedding_text: Aloo Paratha Indian vegetarian dairy-free option whole wheat flour potato spices ghee coriander onion

recipes.title: Vegetable Cutlet
instructions: Mash boiled potato and mixed vegetables together.
Add spices and shape into patties.
Coat with breadcrumbs, shallow fry until golden on both sides.
cooking_tips: Chilling patties for 10 minutes before frying helps them hold shape.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Cutlet Indian vegetarian vegan boiled potato mixed vegetables breadcrumbs spices green chili coriander

recipes.title: Hummus with Veggie Sticks

common_substitutions.tahini: peanut butter (different flavor, works in a pinch)

instructions: Blend chickpeas, tahini, garlic, lemon, and olive oil until smooth.
Adjust consistency with water if needed.
Serve with fresh vegetable sticks.
cooking_tips: Peeling chickpeas before blending gives a silkier hummus.
recipes.embedding_text: Hummus with Veggie Sticks Mediterranean vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free chickpeas tahini garlic lemon olive oil cucumber sticks carrot sticks

recipes.title: Besan Chilla
instructions: Mix besan with water into a smooth batter.
Add chopped vegetables and spices.
Pour on a hot pan, spread thin, cook both sides with a little oil.
cooking_tips: Batter consistency should resemble regular pancake batter.
recipes.embedding_text: Besan Chilla Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free besan onion tomato spices water coriander green chili

recipes.title: Plain Dosa

common_substitutions.dosa batter: can substitute with rava/oats batter in a pinch

instructions: Heat a flat pan, pour a ladle of batter and spread thin in circular motion.
Drizzle oil around edges, cook until golden and crisp.
Fold and serve with chutney or sambhar.
cooking_tips: A well-seasoned pan is key to dosas not sticking.
recipes.embedding_text: Plain Dosa South Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free dosa batter (rice and urad dal) oil potato masala chutney

recipes.title: Oats Vegetable Upma
instructions: Dry roast oats, set aside.
Temper mustard seeds and curry leaves in oil.
Saute onion and vegetables until soft.
Add water, bring to boil, stir in oats, cook until thickened.
cooking_tips: Roasting oats first prevents mushiness.
recipes.embedding_text: Oats Vegetable Upma Indian vegetarian vegan option oats mixed vegetables onion mustard seeds curry leaves peanuts ghee

recipes.title: Peanut Butter Banana Oats
instructions: Mash banana in a bowl.
Add oats and milk, mix well.
Stir in peanut butter.
Let sit 5 minutes or refrigerate overnight, top and serve.
cooking_tips: Great make-ahead breakfast prepared the night before.
recipes.embedding_text: Peanut Butter Banana Oats International vegetarian vegan option gluten-free (certified oats) oats banana peanut butter milk honey chia seeds

recipes.title: Vegetable Poha
instructions: Rinse poha in a strainer until soft; set aside.
Temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, and peanuts in oil.
Saute onion and potato until cooked.
Add poha, turmeric, and salt, mix gently.
Finish with lemon juice and coriander.
cooking_tips: Rinse poha briefly — soaking too long makes it mushy.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Poha Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free flattened rice (poha) onion potato mustard seeds curry leaves peanuts lemon coriander

recipes.title: Pancakes (Basic)
instructions: Whisk dry ingredients together.
Whisk in milk and egg until just combined (small lumps are fine).
Pour batter onto a hot greased pan, cook until bubbles form, flip and cook other side.
Serve with butter and syrup.
cooking_tips: Do not overmix batter — this keeps pancakes fluffy.
recipes.embedding_text: Pancakes (Basic) American vegetarian flour milk egg sugar baking powder butter maple syrup

recipes.title: Vegetable Omelette
instructions: Whisk eggs with salt and pepper.
Saute chopped vegetables briefly in a pan.
Pour eggs over vegetables, cook until set, fold and serve.
cooking_tips: Cook on medium-low heat for a tender omelette.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Omelette International non-vegetarian gluten-free eggs onion tomato capsicum cheese herbs

recipes.title: Egg Bhurji
instructions: Saute onion until translucent.
Add tomato and chili, cook until soft.
Add spices, crack in eggs, scramble continuously until just set.
Garnish with coriander.
cooking_tips: Keep flame medium-low to avoid rubbery eggs.
recipes.embedding_text: Egg Bhurji Indian non-vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free eggs onion tomato green chili spices capsicum coriander

recipes.title: Classic Margherita Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta, reserve some pasta water.
Saute garlic in olive oil.
Add tomatoes, simmer until thick.
Toss pasta into sauce, adding pasta water as needed.
Garnish with basil and cheese.
cooking_tips: Reserved starchy water helps sauce cling to pasta.
recipes.embedding_text: Classic Margherita Pasta Italian vegetarian pasta tomato garlic olive oil basil parmesan chili flakes

recipes.title: Creamy Alfredo Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta until al dente.
Saute garlic in butter.
Add cream, simmer gently, whisk in cheese.
Toss pasta in sauce, season with pepper, garnish with parsley.
cooking_tips: Keep heat low when adding cheese to prevent the sauce from splitting.
recipes.embedding_text: Creamy Alfredo Pasta Italian vegetarian pasta butter cream garlic parmesan black pepper parsley

recipes.title: Vegetable Stir Fry Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta, drain and toss with oil.
Stir-fry vegetables and garlic on high heat.
Add pasta and soy sauce, toss to combine.
Season and serve.
cooking_tips: A great fusion way to use leftover pasta and vegetable odds and ends.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Stir Fry Pasta Fusion vegetarian vegan option pasta mixed vegetables garlic olive oil soy sauce chili flakes

recipes.title: Mushroom Risotto
instructions: Saute onion and mushrooms until soft.
Add rice, toast briefly.
Add stock gradually, stirring continuously until absorbed each time.
Once rice is creamy and cooked, stir in butter and parmesan.
cooking_tips: Add stock a ladle at a time and stir often for the classic creamy texture.
recipes.embedding_text: Mushroom Risotto Italian vegetarian gluten-free arborio rice mushroom onion vegetable stock butter parmesan white wine thyme

recipes.title: Baked Vegetable Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta until al dente.
Mix with tomato sauce and sauteed vegetables.
Transfer to a baking dish, top with cheese.
Bake until cheese melts and bubbles.
cooking_tips: Broiling for the last 2 minutes gives a nice golden top.
recipes.embedding_text: Baked Vegetable Pasta Italian/Fusion vegetarian pasta mixed vegetables tomato sauce cheese oregano garlic

recipes.title: Garlic Bread
instructions: Mix softened butter with minced garlic and parsley.
Spread generously on bread slices.
Toast/bake until golden and crisp.
cooking_tips: Broil for the last minute for extra crispiness — watch closely to avoid burning.
recipes.embedding_text: Garlic Bread Italian vegetarian bread butter garlic parsley cheese chili flakes

recipes.title: Grilled Chicken Breast
instructions: Marinate chicken with oil, garlic, herbs, salt and pepper.
Rest 15 minutes.
Grill or pan-sear on medium-high heat, 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Rest 5 minutes before slicing.
cooking_tips: Resting the meat after cooking keeps it juicy.
recipes.embedding_text: Grilled Chicken Breast International non-vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free chicken breast olive oil garlic herbs lemon black pepper

recipes.title: Fish Curry
instructions: Saute onion and spices until fragrant.
Add coconut milk and tamarind water, simmer.
Add fish fillets, cook gently until just done (do not overcook).
Garnish and serve.
cooking_tips: Add fish last and simmer gently to avoid it breaking apart.
recipes.embedding_text: Fish Curry Indian (Coastal) non-vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free fish fillets coconut milk tamarind spices onion curry leaves green chili

recipes.title: Chicken Tikka
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt, spices, and lemon for at least 30 minutes.
Thread onto skewers with vegetables if desired.
Grill or bake until charred and cooked through.
cooking_tips: Marinating longer (a few hours) deepens the flavor significantly.
recipes.embedding_text: Chicken Tikka Indian non-vegetarian gluten-free chicken yogurt spices lemon onion capsicum for skewers

recipes.title: Mutton Curry
instructions: Marinate mutton with yogurt and spices.
Saute onion, garlic, ginger until deep golden.
Add mutton, sear, then add tomato and spices.
Add water, pressure cook until tender.
Garnish with coriander.
cooking_tips: Slow cooking or pressure cooking is essential for tender mutton.
recipes.embedding_text: Mutton Curry Indian non-vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free mutton onion tomato garlic ginger spices yogurt coriander

recipes.title: Shrimp Scampi
instructions: Boil pasta if serving with it.
Saute garlic in butter until fragrant.
Add shrimp, cook until pink.
Add wine, simmer briefly, toss with pasta and garnish.
cooking_tips: Do not overcook shrimp — remove from heat as soon as they turn pink and curl.
recipes.embedding_text: Shrimp Scampi Italian/American non-vegetarian shrimp garlic butter white wine pasta chili flakes parsley

recipes.title: Roast Chicken
instructions: Rub chicken with butter/oil, garlic, herbs, salt and pepper, inside and out.
Stuff cavity with lemon and herbs.
Roast in oven until internal temperature reaches safe doneness, basting occasionally.
Rest 10 minutes before carving.
cooking_tips: Resting after roasting redistributes juices for a moister result.
recipes.embedding_text: Roast Chicken International non-vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free whole chicken butter/oil garlic herbs lemon potatoes carrots

recipes.title: Masala Papad
instructions: Roast or fry papad until crisp.
Top with finely chopped onion, tomato, and chaat masala.
Serve immediately.
cooking_tips: Serve immediately after topping to keep the papad crisp.
recipes.embedding_text: Masala Papad Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free papad onion tomato chaat masala coriander green chili

recipes.title: Fruit Chaat
instructions: Chop assorted fruits into bite-size pieces.
Toss with chaat masala and lemon juice.
Garnish with mint and serve chilled.
cooking_tips: A great way to use up ripening fruits before they spoil.
recipes.embedding_text: Fruit Chaat Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free seasonal fruits chaat masala lemon mint leaves

recipes.title: Roasted Chickpeas
instructions: Pat chickpeas completely dry.
Toss with oil and spices.
Roast in oven or air fryer until crisp, shaking occasionally.
cooking_tips: Drying chickpeas thoroughly before roasting is key to crispiness.
recipes.embedding_text: Roasted Chickpeas International vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free chickpeas olive oil spices chili powder garlic powder

recipes.title: Banana Oat Cookies
instructions: Mash banana thoroughly.
Mix with oats and cinnamon (and mix-ins if using).
Shape into small rounds on a baking tray.
Bake until lightly golden and set.
cooking_tips: A 2-ingredient base (banana + oats) makes this a flexible, forgiving recipe for using overripe bananas.
recipes.embedding_text: Banana Oat Cookies International vegetarian vegan gluten-free (certified oats) banana oats cinnamon chocolate chips nuts

recipes.title: Vegetable Pakora
instructions: Make a thick batter with besan, water, and spices.
Dip sliced vegetables into batter.
Deep fry until golden and crisp.
Serve hot with chutney.
cooking_tips: Adding a spoon of hot oil to the batter makes pakoras extra crispy.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Pakora Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free besan mixed vegetables spices rice flour for crispiness

recipes.title: Rice Pudding (Kheer)
instructions: Cook rice in milk on low heat, stirring occasionally, until thick and creamy.
Add sugar and cardamom, simmer 10 more minutes.
Garnish with nuts and saffron, serve warm or chilled.
cooking_tips: Low and slow cooking is essential — do not rush this dish.
recipes.embedding_text: Rice Pudding (Kheer) Indian vegetarian gluten-free rice milk sugar cardamom nuts saffron

recipes.title: Chocolate Banana Smoothie
instructions: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour and serve chilled.
cooking_tips: Freeze banana slices in advance for a thicker, colder smoothie.
recipes.embedding_text: Chocolate Banana Smoothie International vegetarian vegan option gluten-free banana milk cocoa powder honey peanut butter

recipes.title: Vegetable Momos
instructions: Make a stiff dough with flour and water; rest 20 minutes.
Saute finely chopped vegetables with garlic and ginger.
Roll dough into small circles, fill and pleat into dumplings.
Steam for 15-18 minutes until translucent.
cooking_tips: Chop the filling very finely so it cooks through during the short steaming time.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Momos Tibetan/Indian vegetarian vegan flour mixed vegetables (finely chopped) garlic ginger soy sauce spring onion

recipes.title: Vegetable Spring Rolls

common_substitutions.spring roll wrappers: can substitute with thin crepe if unavailable

instructions: Stir-fry julienned vegetables with garlic and soy sauce until just tender; cool.
Place filling on wrappers, roll tightly, sealing edges with water.
Deep fry or bake until golden and crisp.
cooking_tips: Let the filling cool completely before wrapping to prevent soggy wrappers.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Spring Rolls Chinese vegetarian vegan spring roll wrappers cabbage carrot garlic soy sauce bean sprouts

recipes.title: Stuffed Bell Peppers

common_substitutions.ground meat: cooked lentils or crumbled paneer for vegetarian

instructions: Halve peppers and remove seeds.
Mix cooked rice with vegetables/meat and seasoning.
Stuff peppers with mixture, top with cheese.
Bake until peppers are tender and cheese is golden.
cooking_tips: Par-boiling peppers briefly beforehand ensures they cook evenly in the oven.
recipes.embedding_text: Stuffed Bell Peppers American/Fusion vegetarian option gluten-free bell peppers rice mixed vegetables or ground meat cheese tomato sauce herbs

recipes.title: Vegetable Frittata
instructions: Saute onion and vegetables in an oven-safe pan.
Whisk eggs with salt and pepper, pour over vegetables.
Cook on stovetop until edges set, then transfer to oven to finish cooking through.
Top with cheese before the last few minutes of baking.
cooking_tips: A great way to use up small amounts of many different vegetables.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Frittata Italian vegetarian gluten-free eggs mixed vegetables cheese onion herbs

recipes.title: Baingan Bharta

common_substitutions.eggplant: no direct substitute; essential to this dish

instructions: Roast eggplant directly over flame or in oven until charred and soft.
Peel and mash the flesh.
Saute onion, garlic, tomato and spices until cooked down.
Add mashed eggplant, mix well and simmer 5 minutes.
cooking_tips: Charring the eggplant directly over a flame gives the dish its signature smoky flavor.
recipes.embedding_text: Baingan Bharta Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free eggplant onion tomato garlic spices coriander green chili

recipes.title: Aloo Gobi
instructions: Saute onion and spices until fragrant.
Add potato and cauliflower, mix well.
Add tomato, cover and cook on low heat until vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally.
Garnish with coriander.
cooking_tips: Cooking covered on low heat allows the vegetables to steam-cook without needing much oil.
recipes.embedding_text: Aloo Gobi Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free potato cauliflower onion tomato spices coriander ginger

recipes.title: Bhindi Fry
instructions: Wash and dry okra thoroughly, slice.
Saute onion until golden.
Add okra and spices, cook uncovered on medium heat, stirring occasionally until non-slimy and lightly crisp.
cooking_tips: Drying okra completely before cooking and cooking uncovered reduces sliminess.
recipes.embedding_text: Bhindi Fry Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free okra onion spices lemon garlic

recipes.title: Vegetable Kofta Curry
instructions: Mix grated vegetables with besan and spices, shape into balls, deep fry until golden.
Prepare an onion-tomato gravy base, simmer until thick.
Add cream, simmer briefly.
Add fried koftas just before serving to keep them from getting soggy.
cooking_tips: Add koftas right before serving so they don't turn mushy in the gravy.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Kofta Curry Indian vegetarian gluten-free mixed grated vegetables besan onion tomato cream cashews spices

recipes.title: Masala Dosa
instructions: Prepare potato masala: temper mustard seeds and curry leaves, saute onion, add boiled mashed potato and turmeric.
Spread dosa batter thin on a hot pan, cook until crisp.
Place potato masala in the center, fold and serve with chutney and sambhar.
cooking_tips: Keep the potato masala slightly warm before filling for the best texture contrast.
recipes.embedding_text: Masala Dosa South Indian vegetarian vegan option gluten-free dosa batter potato onion mustard seeds curry leaves chutney sambhar

recipes.title: Vegetable Manchurian
instructions: Mix grated vegetables with cornflour and spices, shape into balls, deep fry until golden.
Prepare a garlic-soy sauce gravy, thickened lightly with cornflour slurry.
Add fried vegetable balls to the gravy just before serving, toss and garnish.
cooking_tips: For 'dry' Manchurian, skip the gravy and toss balls directly in the sauce.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Manchurian Indo-Chinese vegetarian vegan mixed vegetables cornflour garlic soy sauce spring onion vinegar

recipes.title: Sabudana Khichdi
instructions: Soak sabudana overnight or for several hours until soft.
Heat oil, temper cumin seeds.
Add potato and peanuts, saute until potato is cooked.
Add soaked sabudana, salt, and toss gently until translucent.
Finish with lemon juice and coriander.
cooking_tips: Do not over-soak sabudana or it turns mushy and sticky.
recipes.embedding_text: Sabudana Khichdi Indian vegetarian vegan option gluten-free soaked sago (sabudana) potato peanuts cumin seeds green chili lemon coriander

recipes.title: Vegetable Hakka Noodles
instructions: Boil noodles al dente, drain and toss with a little oil to prevent sticking.
Stir-fry garlic and julienned vegetables on high heat.
Add noodles, soy sauce, and vinegar, toss thoroughly on high flame.
Garnish with spring onion.
cooking_tips: Tossing on high heat in a wide pan gives the smoky 'wok hei' flavor.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Hakka Noodles Indo-Chinese vegetarian vegan noodles cabbage carrot capsicum soy sauce garlic spring onion vinegar

recipes.title: Methi Thepla
instructions: Knead flour with chopped fenugreek leaves, spices, and a little oil into a soft dough.
Roll into thin rounds.
Cook on a hot tawa with a little oil until golden spots appear on both sides.
cooking_tips: Theplas stay fresh for days, making them great for travel or meal prep.
recipes.embedding_text: Methi Thepla Indian vegan vegetarian whole wheat flour fenugreek leaves spices oil yogurt for dough

recipes.title: Vegetable Uttapam
instructions: Spread dosa batter thick on a hot pan (thicker than regular dosa).
Sprinkle chopped vegetables on top while batter is still wet.
Cook on low-medium heat until golden, flip and cook the other side briefly.
cooking_tips: Cooking on low heat ensures the thick batter cooks through without burning.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Uttapam South Indian vegetarian vegan gluten-free dosa batter onion tomato capsicum coriander green chili

recipes.title: Rasam
instructions: Boil tomato, tamarind water, and rasam powder together.
Simmer until flavors combine, about 10 minutes.
Temper mustard seeds, garlic, and curry leaves in oil, pour over rasam.
Garnish with coriander.
cooking_tips: Do not over-boil after adding tamarind, as it can turn bitter.
recipes.embedding_text: Rasam South Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free tomato tamarind rasam powder garlic curry leaves coriander

recipes.title: Vegetable Idli
instructions: Mix grated vegetables into idli batter.
Pour into greased idli molds.
Steam for 10-12 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.
Serve with chutney or sambhar.
cooking_tips: Do not overfill molds — batter rises slightly during steaming.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Idli South Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free idli batter grated carrot peas mustard seeds curry leaves

recipes.title: Paneer Bhurji
instructions: Saute onion until translucent.
Add tomato and spices, cook until soft.
Crumble in paneer, mix well and cook 3-4 minutes.
Garnish with coriander.
cooking_tips: Crumbling paneer by hand gives better texture than grating.
recipes.embedding_text: Paneer Bhurji Indian vegetarian gluten-free paneer onion tomato spices capsicum coriander

recipes.title: Vegetable Semiya Upma
instructions: Roast vermicelli lightly until golden; set aside.
Temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, peanuts in oil.
Saute vegetables until slightly soft.
Add water, bring to boil, add roasted vermicelli, cook covered until soft.
cooking_tips: Roasting vermicelli first prevents it from turning mushy.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Semiya Upma South Indian vegetarian vegan option vermicelli mixed vegetables mustard seeds curry leaves peanuts lemon

recipes.title: Chilli Paneer
instructions: Coat paneer cubes in cornflour, shallow fry until golden; set aside.
Stir-fry garlic, onion, and capsicum on high heat.
Add soy sauce and a little cornflour slurry, toss with fried paneer.
Garnish with spring onion.
cooking_tips: For 'dry' chilli paneer, skip the slurry and toss directly in sauce.
recipes.embedding_text: Chilli Paneer Indo-Chinese vegetarian paneer capsicum onion soy sauce garlic cornflour spring onion vinegar

recipes.title: Vegetable Dhokla
instructions: Mix besan, yogurt, grated vegetables, and a leavening agent into a batter.
Pour into a greased plate/tin, steam for 15-18 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.
Temper mustard seeds and curry leaves, pour over cooled dhokla, cut into squares.
cooking_tips: Steam on medium heat — too high can make the dhokla uneven or rubbery.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Dhokla Indian vegetarian vegan option gluten-free besan yogurt mixed grated vegetables mustard seeds curry leaves green chili

recipes.title: Vegetable Kathi Roll
instructions: Stir-fry vegetables with onion and spices until cooked.
Warm flatbread, spread chutney.
Add filling, roll tightly and optionally toast the roll briefly on a pan.
cooking_tips: Toasting the rolled wrap briefly on a hot pan seals it and adds crunch.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Kathi Roll Indian vegetarian vegan option paratha/flatbread mixed vegetables onion spices chutney egg

recipes.title: Vegetable Pancakes (Savory)
instructions: Mix grated vegetables with flour, spices, and a little water into a thick batter.
Pour spoonfuls onto a hot greased pan, flatten slightly.
Cook until golden on both sides.
cooking_tips: Squeeze excess water from grated vegetables first to keep pancakes from turning soggy.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Pancakes (Savory) Fusion vegetarian vegan option grated vegetables flour spices cheese herbs

recipes.title: Vegetable Fried Rice (Basic)
instructions: Saute garlic and finely chopped vegetables on high heat.
Add cold cooked rice and soy sauce, toss thoroughly.
Garnish with spring onion and serve.
cooking_tips: Using cold, day-old rice prevents clumping and gives better fried-rice texture.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Fried Rice (Basic) Chinese vegan vegetarian gluten-free (with tamari) cooked rice mixed vegetables garlic soy sauce spring onion sesame oil

recipes.title: Vegetable Biryani (Quick Version)
instructions: Saute vegetables with biryani masala and yogurt until partially cooked.
Layer with par-cooked rice in a pot.
Cover tightly and cook on low heat for 15-20 minutes (dum style).
Garnish with mint and fried onion before serving.
cooking_tips: A quicker one-pot version of traditional dum biryani for weeknight cooking.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Biryani (Quick Version) Indian vegetarian gluten-free rice mixed vegetables yogurt biryani masala mint fried onion

recipes.title: Stuffed Paratha (Mixed Vegetable)
instructions: Squeeze excess water from grated vegetables, mix with spices for filling.
Stuff dough balls with filling, roll gently into flatbread.
Cook on a hot tawa with ghee/oil until golden on both sides.
cooking_tips: Squeezing moisture from the filling prevents the paratha from tearing while rolling.
recipes.embedding_text: Stuffed Paratha (Mixed Vegetable) Indian vegetarian whole wheat flour grated mixed vegetables spices ghee coriander

recipes.title: Vegetable Ramen (Quick)
instructions: Boil stock with garlic and soy sauce.
Cook noodles separately as per package instructions.
Blanch or stir-fry vegetables briefly.
Assemble noodles in broth, top with vegetables and egg if using.
cooking_tips: A soft-boiled egg with a jammy yolk is the classic ramen topping.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Ramen (Quick) Japanese/Fusion vegetarian vegan option ramen noodles mixed vegetables garlic soy sauce vegetable stock boiled egg spring onion

recipes.title: Vegetable Korma Rice Bowl
instructions: Prepare vegetable korma as a thick curry using cashew paste and spices.
Serve over a bowl of steamed rice.
Garnish with coriander.
cooking_tips: A convenient bowl-format twist on a traditional curry-and-rice meal.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Korma Rice Bowl Fusion vegetarian gluten-free rice mixed vegetables cashew paste spices raisins coriander

recipes.title: Peanut Chutney
instructions: Blend peanuts, garlic, tamarind, red chili and salt with a little water until smooth.
Temper mustard seeds and curry leaves in oil, pour over chutney.
cooking_tips: Adjust water quantity to control chutney consistency — thicker for dosa, thinner for idli.
recipes.embedding_text: Peanut Chutney South Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free roasted peanuts garlic tamarind red chili curry leaves

recipes.title: Coconut Chutney
instructions: Blend coconut, roasted gram dal, green chili, ginger, and salt with water until smooth.
Temper mustard seeds and curry leaves in oil, pour over chutney.
cooking_tips: Use fresh coconut for the best flavor; frozen grated coconut also works well.
recipes.embedding_text: Coconut Chutney South Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free fresh coconut roasted gram dal green chili ginger curry leaves mustard seeds

recipes.title: Mint Coriander Chutney
instructions: Blend mint, coriander, green chili, lemon juice, and salt with a little water until smooth.
Adjust consistency and seasoning to taste.
cooking_tips: Adding a small piece of ginger brightens the chutney's flavor.
recipes.embedding_text: Mint Coriander Chutney Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free mint leaves coriander leaves green chili lemon yogurt for creamier version

recipes.title: Vegetable Kabab (Shami Style)
instructions: Mash boiled vegetables/lentils with besan and spices.
Shape into flat patties.
Shallow fry on a pan until golden and crisp on both sides.
cooking_tips: Chilling patties for 10-15 minutes before frying helps them hold together.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Kabab (Shami Style) Indian vegetarian vegan option boiled mixed vegetables/lentils besan spices coriander onion

recipes.title: Vegetable Biryani Rice Salad (Cold)
instructions: Toss cooled cooked rice with roasted vegetables and biryani masala.
Squeeze lemon juice, garnish with mint and cashews, serve chilled or at room temperature.
cooking_tips: A creative cold-salad way to repurpose leftover biryani rice.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Biryani Rice Salad (Cold) Fusion vegetarian vegan gluten-free cooked rice mixed roasted vegetables biryani masala lemon mint cashews

recipes.title: Vegetable Stir Fry (Simple)
instructions: Heat oil, saute garlic (and ginger if using).
Add chopped vegetables, stir-fry on high heat until crisp-tender.
Season with soy sauce or salt and pepper, toss and serve.
cooking_tips: A flexible base recipe — works with almost any combination of vegetables on hand.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Stir Fry (Simple) International vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free any available vegetables garlic oil soy sauce or salt ginger chili flakes

recipes.title: Mixed Dal (Panchmel Dal)
instructions: Wash and pressure-cook mixed lentils with turmeric until soft.
Prepare a tempering with garlic, onion, tomato, and spices.
Pour tempering over cooked lentils, simmer 5-10 minutes, garnish with coriander.
cooking_tips: Using a mix of lentils gives a more complex flavor and texture than a single dal.
recipes.embedding_text: Mixed Dal (Panchmel Dal) Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free five mixed lentils onion tomato garlic spices ghee coriander

recipes.title: Vegetable Pulao (Coconut Milk Version)

common_substitutions.coconut milk: regular milk (non-vegan) or water with less richness

instructions: Saute whole spices in oil until fragrant.
Add vegetables, saute briefly.
Add rice and coconut milk instead of water, bring to boil.
Cover and simmer until rice is cooked, fluff and serve.
cooking_tips: Coconut milk adds richness — reduce added salt slightly since coconut milk can be naturally sweet.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Pulao (Coconut Milk Version) Indian vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free rice mixed vegetables coconut milk whole spices cashews curry leaves

recipes.title: Egg Fried Noodles
instructions: Boil noodles, drain and set aside.
Scramble eggs lightly, set aside.
Saute garlic and vegetables if using, add noodles and soy sauce, toss well.
Fold in scrambled egg, garnish with spring onion.
cooking_tips: Scrambling eggs separately keeps them in distinct pieces rather than disappearing into the noodles.
recipes.embedding_text: Egg Fried Noodles Chinese non-vegetarian noodles eggs garlic soy sauce spring onion mixed vegetables

recipes.title: Vegetable Baked Beans on Toast

common_substitutions.baked beans: boiled kidney beans in tomato sauce

instructions: Warm baked beans with sauteed onion.
Toast bread slices.
Pour beans over toast, top with cheese if using.
cooking_tips: A fast, filling meal from mostly pantry-stable ingredients.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Baked Beans on Toast International vegetarian vegan option baked beans bread onion cheese chili flakes

recipes.title: Vegetable Khichdi (One Pot)
instructions: Wash rice and lentils together.
Heat ghee/oil, temper cumin seeds.
Add vegetables and turmeric, saute briefly.
Add rice-lentil mix and water, pressure cook until soft.
Serve hot, optionally with a dollop of ghee.
cooking_tips: A nourishing, easily digestible one-pot meal, great for using up various vegetables.
recipes.embedding_text: Vegetable Khichdi (One Pot) Indian vegetarian vegan gluten-free rice mixed lentils mixed vegetables turmeric cumin seeds ghee ginger

recipes.title: Sweet Potato Curry
instructions: Saute onion until golden.
Add tomato and spices, cook until soft.
Add cubed sweet potato and coconut milk, simmer until tender.
Stir in spinach if using, garnish and serve.
cooking_tips: Sweet potatoes' natural sweetness pairs well with warming spices like cinnamon or cumin.
recipes.embedding_text: Sweet Potato Curry Indian/Fusion vegan vegetarian gluten-free dairy-free sweet potato onion tomato coconut milk spices spinach coriander
